What it does: Registers a new user and creates their Washstation.
Logs in a user and returns JWT tokens.
Onboarding: Creates the shop for a new Google login user.
Fetches dashboard stats (Revenue, Total Washes, etc.).
Fetches the live queue of active washes.
Fetches the list of active workers for assignment.
Generates the real, scannable QR code for the shop.
Fetches financial reports (or downloads a CSV if ?format=csv).
Public: Allows a customer scanning the QR code to request a wash without logging in.
